title: Verify the presence of the update modal
test_steps: Open the Saavn app. | Check if the update modal is displayed.
expected_result: The update modal is displayed with the text 'Update Saavn to get the latest and greatest listening experience!' and a green button labeled 'Update Saavn'.

title: Click on the 'Update Saavn' button
test_steps: Open the Saavn app. | Click on the 'Update Saavn' button.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the app store to initiate the update process.

title: Check if the modal is dismissible
test_steps: Open the Saavn app. | Wait for the update modal to appear. | Tap outside the modal to see if it closes.
expected_result: The update modal should close when tapping outside it.

title: Check if the modal is accessible
test_steps: Open the Saavn app. | Check if the update modal is accessible using accessibility tools.
expected_result: The update modal should be accessible using screen readers and other accessibility tools.

title: Check if the modal is usable
test_steps: Open the Saavn app. | Check if the update modal is easy to understand and navigate.
expected_result: The update modal should be easy to understand and navigate without any usability issues.

title: Check if the modal is persistent
test_steps: Open the Saavn app. | Close the app and reopen it. | Check if the update modal is still displayed.
expected_result: The update modal should be displayed again when the app is reopened.
